name: 86 Chaos 15.0.98 Push Duplicate Browser Token Hotfix
label: 15.0.98 Push Duplicate Browser Token Hotfix
notes: Keeps the 15.0.97 service-worker duplicate-notification protection for Android and desktop browsers.
Stops reminder dispatch from sending both the current fcmToken and old legacy browser tokens to the same user.
Marks newly synced browser push tokens as canonical so future dispatches use one current token per user instead of historical token piles.
